lesson: In 0/1 knapsack's 1D dp array, loop capacity from high to low per item so each item is used at most once; looping low-to-high silently turns it into unbounded knapsack.
For coin-change minimum-coins DP seed dp with float('inf') sentinels (not 0) so unreachable amounts stay distinguishable from a true zero-coin base case.
task: unbounded knapsack / coin change min coins

lesson: For strictly-increasing LIS via patience sorting use bisect_left on the tails array; bisect_right would compute the longest non-decreasing subsequence instead.
task: LIS length in O(n log n)

lesson: Initialize edit-distance DP's first row/column to range(n+1)/range(m+1), the cost of pure insertions or deletions, before applying the min(delete, insert, replace) recurrence.
task: Levenshtein edit distance full DP table

lesson: Matrix-chain DP must iterate the outer loop by increasing interval length (not by i or j directly) so every dp[i][k] and dp[k+1][j] subproblem is already filled before it's read.
Precompute an O(n^2) is-palindrome table by increasing substring length before the min-cut interval DP so each is_pal[i][j] check is O(1) instead of rescanning the substring.
Encode visited-city subsets as integer bitmasks indexing dp[mask][last_city] arrays in TSP DP, not tuples or frozensets, so state lookups stay O(1) array access instead of hashing overhead.
task: traveling salesman exact solve via bitmask DP

lesson: Top-down memoization with functools.lru_cache still recurses on Python's call stack, so an uncached O(n) chain (edit distance on 2000-char strings) hits RecursionError; switch to bottom-up tabulation instead of raising sys.setrecursionlimit.
task: memoized vs iterative edit distance at scale
